overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through a rainy, open grassland with snow-capped mountains in the background. The character encounters and passes two horse-drawn carriages while traversing the atmospheric wilderness landscape.

events.description: first horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall yellow grass toward the distant mountains

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the path, passes the character on the right

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain range visible in the distance under cloudy skies
muddy dirt path with visible wagon wheel tracks cutting through the grass
tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the rolling landscape
wooden horse-drawn carriage with canvas cover and driver

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy trail through an open grassland with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. Tall pine trees line the left side of the path. A horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right, continuing down the trail.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through open prairie with mountains now visible to the right

entered.detail: large leafless dead tree standing alone in the grassland ahead
second wooden horse-drawn carriage approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone through the open grassland as the path curves slightly. The snow-capped mountains shift to the right side of the frame while pine trees pass by on the left. In the distance, a dead tree and a second carriage become visible ahead on the trail.

events.description: second horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dead tree as the second carriage passes by

notable_agents.action: second horse-drawn carriage traveling along the path, passes the character

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large dead tree that dominates the center of the path. A second horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, moving in the opposite direction. The landscape remains open with the snow-capped mountains visible to the right and the trail continuing toward the distant tree.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a muddy trail through an open grassland that gradually shifts its perspective toward a distant, dead tree. It begins with the character walking past tall pine trees on the left while a horse-drawn carriage approaches and passes by on the right. As the path curves slightly, the snow-capped mountains shift toward the right side of the frame, revealing a solitary dead tree and a second carriage appearing in the distance. The scene then closes in on the large dead tree dominating the center of the path as another carriage passes by on the right, moving in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera continues forward along the trail, keeping the open landscape and distant mountains in view.
